builderParamInitError.message: '@BuilderParam' property can only initialized by '@Builder' function or '@LocalBuilder' method in struct.

builderParamV2Error.message: '@BuilderParam' property can only initialized by '@Builder' function.

componentReuseV2ParamsError.message: Methods decorated with '@ComponentReuse' in '@ComponentV2' cannot have input parameters.

computedSetterError.message: A property decorated by '@Computed' cannot define a set method.

extendAnimatableConflictError.message: A function can only be decorated by one of the '@AnimatableExtend', '@Builder', '@Extend', '@Styles', '@Concurrent' and '@Sendable'.
The function can not be decorated by '@Extend' and '@AnimatableExtend' at the same time.

onceWithoutParamError.message: When a variable decorated with '@Once', it must also be decorated with '@Param'.

provideConsumeInitError.message: The '@Consume' property 'consumedValue' in the custom component 'ConsumeWithoutProvide' cannot be initialized here (forbidden to specify).

stylesFunctionArgsError.message: '@Styles' decorated functions and methods cannot have arguments.
